data.body:
🚨NEW STUDY DROP🚨

New remains of Megalibgwilia owenii, a large Pleistocene Echidna, are described from a cave in South Australia. This is the first occurence of the species in SA, filling in a big blank spot in its distribution along the south of the continent.

🎨: Chris Edser
